
    A photorealistic, appetizing, and well-lit image of Alfredo Sauce.
    Summary: Nathan,

I love alfredo. I mean it is one of my favorite sauces. It is so quick and easy and just makes me happy to make some pasta and grilled chicken with this sauce to comfort me after a long day. I hope you find comfort in it too. I love you dearly.

Mom


    Ingredients: ½ cup butter, 1 ½ cup heavy cream, 2 teaspoons minced garlic, ½ teaspoon salt, ½ teaspoon pepper, 1 teaspoon italian seasoning, 2 cups fresh grated parmesan cheese
    Tags: comfort, sauce, pasta
